GYEON Q²M Cure Matte Redefined 500ml

Brand: Gyeon
Price: $44.99 CAD
Barcode: 8809973751368

PREVENTS WATERSPOTS AND STAINS for matte paint & films
For the first couple of weeks following application, quartz coatings exhibit an insignificant tendency to develop hard water stain deposits. The use of Q²M Cure Matte immediately after the base coating application will help eliminate that risk entirely. The product is also amazing as a Quick Detailer, removing all potential streaks and residual water. It gives the paint a vivid shine, restoring the appearance just after coating.

Sharp darkening effect
GYEON Cure Matte not only shields the coating from water spots but also enhances the aesthetic appeal on matte paint and films. It imparts a subtle tint, elevating the matte finish to a deeper and richer appearance.

Simplifies the cleaning process for matte finishes.
For maintenance purposes on ceramic-coated, matte, or satin-finished surfaces, including color-changing wraps and stealth PPF, use Q²M Cure Matte.
TIP: You can apply the product on both wet and dry paint to enhance the finish, extend the durability of the coating, and assist in drying and streak removal.

GYEON CURE MATTE CERAMIC SPRAY SEALANT

Q²M Cure Matte Redefined is a unique, silica-based spray sealant designed for matte-finished paints. It is both a stand-alone product, providing durable protection and self-cleaning abilities and a spray detailer for ceramic coatings. It increases the depth and intensity of colour without adding any gloss to the finish. Through regular maintenance, you may gain an extension of the excellent hydrophobic effect of up to 90% of the durability of the base coating, preventing it from water spots at the same time.

UNIQUE: Q²M Cure Matte Redefined is a unique, silica-based spray sealant designed for matte-finished paints and wraps. It's both a stand-alone product providing durable protection and self-cleaning abilities, as well as a spray detailer for ceramic coatings. It increases the depth and intensity of the colour without adding any gloss to the finish.

REDEFINED: We are introducing our REDEFINED line. At GYEON, we've taken our renowned chemical formulas to a whole new level. We've reworked and refined them to deliver unmatched performance, exceptional durability, and the utmost ease of use. We're committed to giving our customers the best user experience possible.

BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN: Use Q²M Cure Matte Redefined for maintenance purposes on ceramic coated, matte or satin-finished surfaces, including colour-changing wraps and stealth PPF. TIP: You may use the product both on wet and dry paint - it will enhance the finish, prolong the durability of the coating and help with drying and removing streaks.

FAQ:

Q: Can I use this on all matte surfaces including wheels?
A: Yes, it's safe on all matte finishes, whether painted, powder-coated, filmed, or untreated. It will leave an even and rich finish.

Q: Is it streaky?
A: It may streak and leave shadows if the panels are too hot or if too much product is used because it's very concentrated. If it does, simple wash with soap or apply product to even it out.

Q: How long does it last?
A: About 3~4 months.

Q: Does it fill tiny scratches and swirls?
A: A little bit, won't hide all your scratches but will improve them.

Q: Can I apply on PPF, plastics and windows?
A: Yes, it is compatible with all exterior surfaces. If you get it on windows, gloss paint, PPF etc., it's not a problem.

Q: Anything else I need to know?
A: Microscopically, matte paint is textured and bumpy, making it more prone to attracting dirt compared to gloss surfaces, which can pose challenges in maintenance. Additionally, scratches cannot be polished out without causing a glossy appearance. The same applies to water spots, bug guts, and bird droppings – if etched into the paint or film, they leave circular marks that are impossible to remove (no polishing matte). Therefore, it's crucial to take proactive care of your matte finish by applying a proper matte ceramic coating initially. This helps prevent contaminants from absorbing and etching into the paint or film.

Gyeon Cure Matte - 500 ml

Price: $39.99
Product Code: GY-1627
Available Size: 500 ml

Product Information:
- Matte safe spray on silica-based sealant!
- Keeps matte surfaces matte
- Protects for up to 6 weeks

Product Description:
The Gyeon Cure Matte is a unique, silica-based spray sealant designed for matte finished paints! When working on matte surfaces, you want to make sure you are using products designed for matte. If you do not, you risk adding unwanted white streaks that are very hard to remove. With Cure Matte, Gyeon has designed a spray sealant that will protect your matte surfaces for up to 6 weeks. Just spray and wipe, application is incredibly easy and the protection left behind will not add any gloss to the surface. This sealant will keep the matte surfaces the way we love them, matte. Cure Matte will however increase the depth and intensity of the matte color and through regular maintenance, you can extend the hydrophobic effect of up to 90% of the durability of the base coating applied. This allows you to continue to protect the surface and combat ugly water marks from happening.

From The Label:
Concentrated maintenance spray for any matte surface & ceramic coating. Easy and fast application. Enhances and protects.
- Matte ceramic maintenance
- Self-cleaning properties
- Water repellent

Directions:
Shake well before use. Use only on a clean surface. Spray onto a microfiber and rub in a panel at a time till a streak free finish. Wet/dry use possible. Makes drying the car easier. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

Customer Reviews:
No reviews yet.

sources.page_title: Gyeon Q2M Cure Matte REDEFINED 500ml | Product
sources.cleaned_content:
Gyeon Q2M Cure Matte REDEFINED 500ml

Brand: GYEON
SKU: 116164
Price: $59.99 AUD (Tax included)

Description:
Gyeon Q²M Cure Matte is a unique, silica-based spray sealant designed for matte finished paints. It is both a stand-alone product, providing durable protection and self-cleaning abilities and a spray detailer for ceramic coatings. It increases the depth and intensity of color without adding any gloss to the finish. Through regular maintenance you may gain an extension of the excellent hydrophobic effect of up to 90% of the durability of the base coating, preventing it from waterspots at the same time.

Product Features and Benefits:
- Designed specifically for matte paint finishes
- Contains SiO2 technology for long-lasting protection against the elements
- Provides a uniform matte finish without adding gloss
- Easy to use spray-on formula
- Does not leave streaks or residue
- Can be used as a standalone sealant or as a maintenance product for coatings

Gyeon Q²M Cure Matte is a unique, silica-based spray sealant designed for matte finished paints and wraps. It both a stand-alone product providing durable protection and self-cleaning abilities, as well as a spray detailer for ceramic coatings. It increases the depth and intensity of the color without adding any gloss to the finish.

With regular use Gyeon Matte Cure can also reduce the risk of waterspots or staining forming and etching into your matte or satin factory paint as well as matte vinyl wraps. A single application of Gyeon Q2M Matte Cure can offer greater than 6 weeks of protection.

Consumption: 30 ml/car
PH Tolerance: 4-9
Durability: >6 weeks

How to Use:
Before using Gyeon Q²M Cure Matte, make sure that your vehicle is clean and dry. We recommend washing your vehicle with Gyeon Q2M Bathe or a similar car shampoo and drying it thoroughly.

Step 1 - Shake the Bottle: Shake the bottle of Gyeon Q²M Cure Matte well before use to ensure that the product is mixed evenly.

Step 2 - Apply the Product: Apply a small amount of Gyeon Q²M Cure Matte onto a clean microfiber towel. Spread the product onto the paintwork in a circular motion, working on a small section at a time.

Step 3 - Buff the Surface: Using a clean microfiber towel, buff the surface to remove any excess product and create a high-gloss finish.

Step 4 - Repeat the Process: Repeat the process on the rest of the vehicle's paintwork, working on one section at a time. Make sure that you apply the product evenly and avoid overlapping onto areas that have already been treated.

Step 5 - Wait for the Product to Cure: Allow the product to cure for at least 1 hour before exposing the vehicle to water or other environmental factors. During this time, avoid touching the paintwork to prevent introducing new marks or scratches.

Q²M CURE MATTE REDEFINED

Category: Exterior / maintenance
Ceramic spray sealant for matte paint.

Q²M Cure Matte REDEFINED is a silica-based maintenance spray explicitly developed for matte-finished paint. It provides durable protection, self-cleaning properties, and colour depth enhancement without adding gloss, making it suitable for regular maintenance of matte surfaces.

Versatile hydrophobic ceramic maintenance spray and sealant.
Q²M Cure Matte REDEFINED helps preserve the appearance and performance of matte finishes by refreshing hydrophobic behaviour and preventing contamination build up. Regular use can extend the durability of water repellency while keeping the original matte look intact.

Key Benefits:
- Matte ceramic maintenance
- Self-cleaning properties
- Water repellent

TECHNICAL DETAILS:
Capacities: 500 ML
Real World Lifespan: over 6 weeks
PH Tolerance: 4-9
Consumption: 30ml/car

HOW TO USE:
1. Apply Q²M Cure Matte REDEFINED to a clean surface or microfibre towel.
2. Spread evenly over the matte surface.
3. Wipe gently to remove excess product.
4. Use regularly to maintain protection and appearance.
5. Avoid over application to prevent marks.

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS:

Q: Is Q²M Cure Matte REDEFINED safe for matte paint?
A: Yes. It is designed specifically for matte finishes.

Q: Does it add gloss to the surface?
A: No. It maintains the original matte appearance.

Q: Can it be used as a stand alone product?
A: Yes. It protects on its own.

Q: How often should it be applied?
A: Regular use during maintenance is recommended.

Q: Does it help prevent water spots?
A: Yes. It helps reduce water spotting on matte surfaces.
